archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Editorial Organic

global_rules.approach: Desktop-first, highly functional, premium editorial tool
global_rules.texture: Apply a subtle CSS noise/grain overlay across the entire app to remove digital flatness.

layout.structure: 100vh layout without standard vertical scroll. Fixed header, dynamic main area.
layout.main_grid: Flex container with horizontal flex-row. Each color card is flex-1. Smooth transition on flex-basis/width when size changes.

hero_header.layout: Asymmetric flex-row. Left: 'Colorfly Studio' (Bodoni Moda). Right: Controls bar.

controls_bar.description: Contains size selector, format toggle, save palette button, and generate button. Grouped tightly.
controls_bar.size_selector: Segmented control (6, 8, 9). Sharp edges. Active state: bg-[#121212] text-[#F4F3EE]. data-testid='size-selector-{value}'
controls_bar.format_toggle: Toggle between HSL / HEX. Monospace font. data-testid='format-toggle'
controls_bar.generate_button: Prominent CTA. Solid black bg, white text. px-8 py-4. font-sans uppercase text-xs tracking-widest. data-testid='generate-palette-button'

color_cards_grid.layout: Flex container taking remaining vertical space. Cards sit side-by-side filling width.
color_cards_grid.card_style: flex flex-col relative group transition-all duration-500 ease-in-out border-r border-border last:border-r-0. data-testid='color-card'
color_cards_grid.card_content: Top/Center area filled with the color. Bottom area (bg-background p-6) shows the Hex/HSL code in IBM Plex Mono. Tool actions (lock, copy) appear on hover in the colored area.
color_cards_grid.lock_button: Icon button (Lucide Lock/Unlock). Toggles state. data-testid='lock-color-button-{index}'
color_cards_grid.copy_interaction: Click anywhere on the colored area to copy. Show 'COPIAR' label on hover. data-testid='copy-color-button-{index}'

saved_palettes_drawer.layout: Fixed right-side panel, w-96. Slides in (Framer Motion).
saved_palettes_drawer.content: List of mini-palette rows. Each row shows color swatches side-by-side and a 'Restore' button.

toast_notifications.style: Minimalist rectangular box. bg-[#121212] text-[#F4F3EE]. font-mono text-sm. Bottom center or right.

footer.content: Minimal text 'Colorfly Studio © 2026' left-aligned. 'Presiona Espacio para regenerar' right-aligned.
footer.style: pt-6 mt-6 border-t border-border flex justify-between font-sans text-xs tracking-widest uppercase text-text_secondary

interactions_and_animations.generation: Staggered reveal of colors. Use framer-motion layout animations so when size changes, columns grow/shrink smoothly.
interactions_and_animations.hover_states: Color cards should dim slightly or show an overlay gradient when hovered to make lock/copy buttons legible if the generated color is too bright or dark. Use CSS mix-blend-mode or dynamic contrast.
interactions_and_animations.keyboard: Listen to 'keydown' for 'Space' key. Prevent default scrolling. Trigger regeneration. (Don't trigger if typing in an input, though there are no text inputs here).

testing.attributes: Ensure all data-testid attributes are implemented as specified in the component definitions.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a noise overlay using a pseudo-element or SVG filter over the body to give a tactile, magazine feel.
Logic: Store an array of color objects { id, hex, hsl, locked } in React state.
Use a color library or write a small utility to convert between RGB/HEX/HSL. HSL is great for random generation (e.g. random Hue, random saturation 30-90%, random lightness 20-80%).
Ensure the UI uses sharp corners (rounded-none) rather than soft borders to maintain the editorial/brutalist look.
All text must be in Spanish.
